changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE SEQUENCE partner_fin_prop_id_seq START 1;
CREATE TABLE partner_fin_account_property (
id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT nextval('partner_fin_prop_id_seq'),
partner_id BIGINT NOT NULL, account_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
property_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL CHECK (property_type IN ('RECEIVABLE','PAYABLE')),
fin_account_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now(),
CONSTRAINT uq_partner_company_property UNIQUE (partner_id, account_id, property_type),
CONSTRAINT fk_prop_partner FOREIGN KEY (partner_id) REFERENCES partner(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_prop_company FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES app_accounts(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_prop_fin_account FOREIGN KEY (fin_account_id) REFERENCES fin_accounts(id) );
CREATE INDEX idx_prop_partner ON partner_fin_account_property(partner_id); CREATE INDEX idx_prop_account ON partner_fin_account_property(account_id);
